---
name: Requirements request
about: For Pegasus team to propose Requirements
title: "[The person or department]:"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Source & Business Value (需求來源與價值)
✔️ Source Details (來源詳情)：

✔️ Legal regulations (法規名稱、條文章節)：

✔️ Certification (認證標準與條款)：
[e.g., ISO 27001 Annex A.12.3 - Backup]

✔️ Tender (標案名稱、文件頁碼與項目編號)：

✔️ Customers/Users (客戶或回饋來源)：

✔️ Business Value / Problem to Solve (商業價值／想要解決的問題)：

Rationale (Why - Why do we need to spend resources on this? / 為什麼我們要花資源做這個？)：

Desirability (Enhance user satisfaction / 提升使用者滿意度)：

Business Viability (Increase revenue and reduce costs / 增加營收, 降低成本)：

Regulatory / Compliance (Compliant with regulations / 符合法規)：


<br>

 2. Detailed Description (需求詳述)
✔️ User Story (使用者故事) - (If applicable)：
As a [specific role, e.g., website administrator, user]
I want to [perform a certain action]
So that [achieve a specific goal or value]

✔️Functional Requirements (功能性需求) ：
Use bullet points to clearly describe what the system must do.Each item should be specific and verifiable.
1. The system must provide users with the ability to delete their personal accounts.
2. Before deletion, the system must display a confirmation dialog, requiring the user to confirm again.
3. ...

✔️Non-Functional Requirements (非功能性需求) - (If applicable)：


<br>

3. Acceptance Criteria (驗收標準)
Use a testable checklist to define the criteria for “Done.” The requirement is considered complete only when all criteria are satisfied.(用一個可測試的清單，定義「完成」的標準。當所有標準都滿足時，這個需求才算完成。)

<br>

4. Constraints & Dependencies (限制與依賴性)
✔️Constraints (技術限制)：
Are there any technical constraints? (是否有任何技術上的限制？)
  [e.g., For example, must specific APIs be used, or is support for legacy browsers required? (例如：必須使用特定的 API、必須支援舊版瀏覽器等。)]

✔️Dependencies(依賴關係)：
Does this requirement depend on the completion of other requirements, or do other requirements depend on this one? (這個需求是否依賴其他需求先完成？或是其他需求依賴此需求？)

<br>

5. Attachments & Notes (附件與備註)
✔️Attachments (附件)： Attached are the relevant files.
<!-- [e.g., UI/UX design mockups, flowcharts, original regulatory documents, customer email screenshots, etc.]-->

✔️Notes (備註)：
<!-- [e.g., Any additional information that needs to be supplemented.]-->
